# WaveKit

> Fan-made Wuthering Waves team helper and Resonator guide for players who want practical team suggestions based on the characters and weapons they own.

WaveKit helps Wuthering Waves players choose teams without needing to understand every meta spreadsheet first. The site focuses on readable, player-friendly advice while still providing build details such as weapons, Echo/Sonata notes, stat direction, and team role context.

This is an independent fan project. Wuthering Waves belongs to Kuro Games.

## Key Pages

- [WaveKit team helper](https://wavekit.net/): Interactive team helper, profile tools, owned Resonator selection, owned weapon selection, team suggestions, and feedback form.
- [Wuthering Waves character guides](https://wavekit.net/characters/): Index of WaveKit's Wuthering Waves Resonator guides.
- [Sitemap](https://wavekit.net/sitemap.xml): Full list of indexable WaveKit pages.
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/wgGaqt6pvD): Community feedback and tester discussion.

## What WaveKit Covers

- Wuthering Waves team suggestions based on owned Resonators.
- Character guide pages with build, weapon, Echo, Sonata, and team notes.
- Safer fallback team logic when a player does not own the ideal premium team.
- Optional account sync for keeping profiles across devices.
- Player feedback workflows for correcting or improving team logic.

## Audience

WaveKit is for Wuthering Waves players who want useful team and build help without being pressured into only perfect meta teams. It is especially aimed at players who find team-building confusing, but it also keeps enough structure for experienced players to scan builds quickly.

## Preferred Description

WaveKit is a fan-made Wuthering Waves team helper that suggests practical teams and builds from the Resonators and weapons a player owns.
